The 2026 JMC VIGUS PRO brand new double cabin pickup trucks designed to deliver power, durability, comfort, and modern technology for both commercial and personal use. Built on a strong and reliable ladder-frame chassis, these pickups are ideal for city driving, long-distance travel, off-road performance, and heavy-duty work applications.

Available now at Amjad Motors International Limited, located on Kawawa Road, both models come with 0KM mileage and offer a premium driving experience combined with excellent load-carrying capability and advanced safety features.

Vehicle Details

* Chassis Models: JMC VIGUS PRO
* Body Type: Double Cabin Pickup
* Condition: Brand New
* Mileage: 0 KM
* Fuel Type: Diesel
* Transmission: Automatic 
* Drivetrain: 4x2 / 4x4 options available

Features & Specif

* Height: 1,520 mm
* Ground Clearance: Around 155–185 mm depending on version

* Roof rails

The 2006 Toyota Hilux Surf is a midsize SUV known for its durability, comfort, and strong off-road capability. It is popular for both city driving and adventure trips.

Key Features

* Engine options:
 • 2.7L petrol
* Transmission:
 • Automatic transmission
* Drive type:
 • 2WD 
~Interior:
 •Spacious cabin with comfortable seats
 •Dual AC and premium interior finish
~Safety:
 •ABS brakes
 •Airbags
 •Stability control on higher trims
~ Performance:
 •Reliable engine performance
 • Strong suspension for rough roads
 •Excellent ground clearance for off-road 

“The 2006 Toyota Hilux Surf combines luxury, durability, and off-road performance. It offers a comfortable interior, powerful engine options, and reliable handling, making it ideal for both daily driving and long-distance travel.”
